title: AN ACT DECLARING NOVEMBER 26 OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF DASMARIÃAS, PROVINCE OF CAVITE, AND ALL ITS BARANGAYS TO BE KNOWN AS THE "FOUNDATION DAY OF THE CITY OF DASMARIÃAS"

chunks.text:
115 OG No. 47, 13151 (November 25, 2019)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11461, September 05, 2019 ]

AN ACT DECLARING NOVEMBER 26 OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF DASMARIÃAS, PROVINCE OF CAVITE, AND ALL ITS BARANGAYS TO BE KNOWN AS THE "FOUNDATION DAY OF THE CITY OF DASMARIÃAS"

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. November 26 of every year is hereby declared a special working holiday in the City of Dasmariñas, Province of Cavite, and all its barangays to be known as the "Foundation Day in the City of Dasmariñas". Upon proclamation of the President, November 26 of every year shall be a special nonworking holiday in the City of Dasmariñas Province of Cavite.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives on December 10, 2018, amended by the Senate of the Philippines on June 3, 2019, and which amendments were concurred in by the House of Representatives on June 4, 2019.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

DANTE ROBERTO P. MALING

Acting Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: SEP 05 2019

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
